_notes: Story dialogue and NPC text. Reconstructed from game knowledge. Dialogue ID format: location_npc_line.

intro: Long ago, a god created many worlds stacked upon each other.
At the top lives the Creator, who rules over all.
Four brave warriors set out to climb the Tower of God...
world1_enter: You stand at the base of a great adventure.
The town of Base lies ahead.
Somewhere in this world are the Crystal Balls you need.
tower_enter: This is the Tower of God.
The Creator awaits at the top.
There is no turning back now.
ashura_pre: So you have made it this far.
I am Ashura, guardian of the Creator.
creator_pre: Then let it be so. I shall grant you death!
victory: But what awaits beyond the Creator's realm?

w1_base_elder.name: Village Elder
lines: The Tower of God looms above all worlds.
Many have tried to climb it. None have returned.
To reach World 2, you need 4 Crystal Balls.
The Crystal Balls are guarded in dungeons throughout this world.

w1_base_merchant.name: Merchant
lines: Fine wares for a fine adventurer!
Mutants grow stronger with every battle.
Humans are strongest when well equipped.
Monsters can transform by eating meat!

w1_prison_girl.name: Imprisoned Princess
lines: The guards have taken everything from my kingdom.
If you defeat the captain, I'll reward you.

w2_old_man.name: Old Man
lines: She steals the youth from all who enter her tower.
Only the Crystal Balls can restore what she has taken.
